outputs: Return path cannot be calculated while the route remembers you arriving.
Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
warnings: The operator should read the output only once. A second reading may produce a different room but the same filing requirement.
Staff who experience nostalgia while reading a terminal output should record the sensation under routine environmental discomfort, not memory recall.
If the response includes a clock, preserve the printed hour but do not compare it with wall time unless all nearby clocks consent.
